title: RUSTINS Brilliant White Gloss Paint 500ml
features: Fast Drying Formula: Rustins Quick Dry Water-Based Wood Dye dries rapidly, allowing for efficient project completion. Perfect for both DIY enthusiasts and professional woodworkers.
Vibrant Colours: Available in a range of rich, vibrant colours, this wood dye enhances the natural beauty of your wood surfaces, providing a stunning finish that lasts
Water-Based and Low Odor: This dye is water-based, making it easy to clean up with soap and water. Its low-odor formula ensures a pleasant working environment. ADD TO BASKET now
Deep Penetration: Rustins Wood Dye penetrates deeply into the wood grain, ensuring long-lasting colour and protection while highlighting the natural texture and patterns of the wood
Versatile Application: Suitable for use on all types of wood, this dye can be applied with a brush, cloth, or spray. Available in various sizes to meet the needs of any project, large or small
description: From the manufacturer About Us Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with 50 pounds. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the good brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins Brilliant White Gloss Paint 500ml A brilliant white water based hardwearing paint for interior and exterior use that is touch dry in approximately 30 minutes. Suitable for use on wood and metal. Water based and quick drying.
